documentation_impact.rationale: This local diff changes operator-facing documentation and governance references, including OPERATION and handbook/persona projections, so documentation-impact tracking is required in the same governed commit scope.

deferred_items.rationale: node --test tests/*.test.mjs fails the repository JSON formatting check on parent-harness artifacts outside this subordinate touch-set, and the exception is already documented in the delivery report and review artifacts.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Human-gated stage advancement is preserved; this artifact is produced at ship stage without git commit, push, or ddl advance, and the operator must ratify local diff before advancing.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Documentation/reference stewardship is satisfied by recording changed surfaces and explicit deferred follow-up for known out-of-scope validation drift.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Feature-delivery governance goals remain aligned: stage outputs are auditable, validation evidence is recorded, and human approval remains required before advancing beyond ship gate.
